author: ESPN YouTube
text:
PAIGE BUECKERS & AZZI FUDD DAZZLE 🤩 Combine for 48 PTS in Wings' BIG WIN | WNBA ESPN
See highlights from rookies Azzi Fudd (24 PTS, 2 REB, 3 AST, 3 STL, 2 BLK) and Paige Bueckers (24 PTS, 6 REB, 2 AST) as the duo combined for 48 points to lead the Dallas Wings past the New York Liberty, 91-76. Fudd’s 17-point third quarter ties the WNBA record for second-most points in a quarter by a rookie, while her 6 3PM also set a new Wings rookie record, surpassing Bueckers.

✔️ Subscribe to ESPN Unlimited: https://plus.espn.com/

text:
REIGNING CHAMPS RETURN 🤘 Texas shuts out Arizona State to head back to WCWS | ESPN College Softball
Watch the highlights as the reigning champion Texas Longhorns earn a shutout victory over Arizona State, 5-0, in Game 3 of the NCAA Softball Super Regionals to return to the WCWS.
